_comment: David's home Record config. Credentials in env/secrets/david.env
(gitignored). The shard tree is defined by ./david-home/mounts.json.
signed by keysFor('wake-inbox') from David's creds
- turnstone/  (ours:false) — foreign mount to Claude's Turnstone Record
- watcher/    (ours:false) — foreign mount to the wake-watcher Record
Writes under ./david-home/wake-inbox/ get sharded into David's wake-inbox
sub-Record automatically. Foreign mounts subscribe read-only.
IMPORTANT: relative paths in this config resolve against THIS FILE's
directory (env/), not CWD — so 'files: ../david-home' points at the
repo-root david-home/. Same for the archive path. (Turnstone tripped
on this 2026-07-14 debugging session; documented for future-us.)
the env file rather than this config, so this file is safe to commit.
